{{Quote|Norvanian reserve grog. From the planet Ban-Satir two in the Corporate Sector. The north side of the island of N'van, I believe. Expensive.|Jahan Cross identifies a a glass of Norvanian grog|<ref name="Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 1">[[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 1|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''Ban-Satir II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Ban-Satir system/Legends|Ban-Satir system]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Through Ban-Satir II ran the [[Tingel Route]] hyperspace lane, which connected the planet with the worlds of [[Issagra]] and [[Gaurick]].<ref name="EA" />

A lush but dull [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]], Ban-Satir II is famous for its [[Novanian grog/Legends|Novanian grog]],<ref name="EA" /> an expensive and potent intoxicant. It is produced and marketed from the isle of [[N'van]] in the planet's northern hemisphere.<ref name="GU" /> The best Norvanian vintages are reserved for the Authority's elite, making Norvanian Reserve a popular cargo for [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]].<ref name="EA" /> At the same time, the distributors on Ban-Satir II sometimes encountered problems that hindered trade.<ref name="M2">''[[Star Wars Missions 2: Escape from Thyferra]]''</ref>

[[Gender/Legends|Female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Voralla Morbo]] grew up on the corporate retreat of the Isle of N'Van. Spending years in the service industry, working around executives from across the galaxy, she developed a head for business and a keen ear.<ref name="SR" />
